name: magiiss-playwright
description: Proyecto de automatización E2E para MAGIIS con Playwright + TypeScript

scripts.---DEV (TEST)---: ─── Desarrollo y ejecución diaria en TEST ───
scripts.test:test:auth: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test tests/features/auth/specs tests/specs/api --project=chromium
scripts.test:test:gateway-pg: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts
scripts.test:test:gateway-pg:stripe: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test tests/specs/gateway-pg/stripe -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts
scripts.test:gateway:smoke: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts --project=smoke
scripts.test:gateway:critical: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts --project=critical
scripts.test:gateway:regression: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts --project=regression-web
scripts.test:gateway:cargo: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts --project=cargo-a-bordo
scripts.test:gateway:all: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test -c playwright.gateway-pg.config.ts --project=gateway-pg-chromium
scripts.test:test:smoke: cross-env ENV=test npx playwright test tests/features/smoke/specs --project=chromium
scripts.test:uat:smoke: cross-env ENV=uat npx playwright test tests/features/smoke/specs --project=chromium
scripts.test:prod:smoke: cross-env ENV=prod npx playwright test tests/features/smoke/specs --project=chromium
scripts.test:prod:smoke:headed: cross-env ENV=prod npx playwright test tests/features/smoke/specs --project=chromium --headed
scripts.clean:all: rm -rf evidence test-results playwright-report allure-results allure-report

author: MAGIIS QA Team
